text: Numerous pharmacological and computational studies have lent strong support for this relationship. For instance, picrotoxin, applied intracellularly, was capable of blocking GABA-activated chloride current (Akaike et al. 1985). Recently, a computational study using homology modeling, docking and molecular dynamics simulation methods revealed that difference in binding affinity of fipronil with different iGABARs may lead to differential toxicity (potency) (Zheng et al. 2014).
